query_normalized: qwen-image-flash: beyond objective design computer science
rationale: The paper studies Qwen‑VL, a vision‑language model built on the Qwen family, which shares the same underlying architecture and training paradigm as the Qwen‑Image‑Flash model the user is investigating; thus it provides same‑mechanism evidence (criterion a) relevant for a literature review on Qwen‑Image‑Flash.
